title: Fast Sleep
description: Instantly skip to day when sleeping
body:
![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/F6Sjr2Yy?label=Downloads)\
Fast Sleep is a data pack that instantly skips to day when you are sleeping!

Why?
Well, if you experience a lot of lag when playing Minecraft, you may notice that sleeping takes a very long time, and this instantly skips it, making the game a lot more playable.
Also, it can improve performance in a few cases by allowing a single player to skip the night on multiplayer servers instead of waiting for all players to sleep, reducing lag from night-time events.

Example:\
![Instantly Skipping To Day](https://i.postimg.cc/V6WPhm4H/gif.gif)\
Sleeping instantly skips to day.

I hope you enjoy!
